design_philosophy: Premium, distinctive, gamer-focused but refined. Like a pro TCG tool (MTG Arena / Marvel Snap deck builders). High contrast, immersive dark mode with rich, tactile surfaces and distinct color coding for the 14 Natures.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Bento grid protocol for dashboards. Mobile-first grids.

grid_patterns.deck_builder: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (Filters: col-span-3, Library: col-span-6, Deck: col-span-3)
grid_patterns.card_grid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4

surfaces_and_materials.card_base: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg

navigation.style: Glassmorphism sticky header. Must have z-50.
navigation.links: Hover state: text-white. Active state: text-indigo-400.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors border border-indigo-500
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors border border-slate-700
buttons.outline: bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors border border-slate-700

forms.inputs: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-colors

game_card.structure: Relative container. Background image with gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/40 to-transparent). Absolute positioned stats at bottom, nature icons at top left, rarity at top right.

charts.library: Recharts (Radar chart for Nature coverage, Bar chart for Mana/Stat curve). Must use transparent backgrounds and match theme colors.

animations_and_interactions.hover: Explicitly set hover:text-white or lighter shades. Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
animations_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion staggered children for grid lists (e.g., card library loading in sequence).
animations_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Card tilt effect (react-parallax-tilt) for 3D premium feel on hover.

icons_and_assets.icon_library: lucide-react for UI, @phosphor-icons/react for rich/dense dashboard sections if needed.

hero_bg.description: Mystical dark background with orange/black clouds for login/signup pages

card_texture.description: Black textile texture for card backs or empty card slots

magic_energy.description: Swirling purple flame on black for magical accents or Entidade/Mago natures

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the visual Game Card component (do not use Shadcn card for the actual playing card, use raw div with aspect-ratio, absolute positioning, and the 'card_texture' background for empty state).
Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard scaffolding (Sidebar, Navigation, Forms, Modals).
Implement the 14 Natures as a constant mapping to colors, and use these colors for badges, borders, and chart data.
For the Deck Strategic Analysis, use Recharts to build a RadarChart showing the balance of Natures in the deck, and a BarChart for the curve.
Ensure the Card Builder has a real-time preview of the card as the user fills out the form.
Implement drag-and-drop or simple click-to-add for moving cards from the Library to the Deck list.
Deck rules enforcement: Max 20 cards, max 2 duplicates (check ALPHA rules if provided). Display visual warnings if rules are broken.
DO NOT USE INTER, ROBOTO, LATO for headings. Use Outfit. Use Manrope for body text.
Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds, textures, and placeholders. Never use via.placeholder.com.
